g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does collector.py publish to SQS?')
sendPrompt('What does the Bronze Airflow DAG do?')
sendPrompt('What transformations happen in the Silver DAG?')
sendPrompt('What features are engineered in the Gold layer?')
sendPrompt('How does the training DAG use MLflow?')
sendPrompt('How does MLflow manage model versions and promotion?')
sendPrompt('What Airflow inference DAG runs batch predictions?')
sendPrompt('How does Lambda expose the Isolation Forest inference endpoint?')
sendPrompt('How does Grafana alert via Telegram on anomalies?')
sendPrompt('How does Fluent-bit ship logs from the edge?')
sendPrompt('What metrics does OpenTelemetry collect from the edge?')
sendPrompt('What does Node Exporter monitor on the Raspberry Pi?')
sendPrompt('What dashboards does Grafana Cloud show?')
sendPrompt('How is the Telegram bot triggered by Grafana alerts?')
sendPrompt('What does the Terraform repo provision on AWS?')
sendPrompt('How does ArgoCD deploy from the manifests repo to EKS?')
sendPrompt('What workloads does ArgoCD manage on EKS?')
sendPrompt('What does Jenkins build and push for the ML training pipeline?')

svg.text: Synthetic anomaly generator → injects edge-case data into Bronze layer
